J0800Z_NO_SGN_PAIN_CD J0800Z Staff Assessment for Pain: None of Above Signs of Pain Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that no signs of pain were observed or documented in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
349 J0850_STF_PAIN_FREQ_CD J0850_STF_PAIN_FREQ_CD J0850 Staff Frequency of Indicator of Pain or Possible Pain Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency of the resident's pain or
